news.title: AI Startups Surge in 2026

news.description: Firebase expands its real-time capabilities, making it easier to build collaborative apps with live data synchronization.

news.title: WebAssembly Gains Popularity in Frontend Apps
news.description: Developers are increasingly using WebAssembly to run high-performance code directly in the browser.
